creator: usenet@ulrich-grey.de
text:
Created attachment 170089
Poudriere build log www/webkit-gtk2 With debug symbols

I have built webkit-gtk2-2.4.11 with debug symbols natively on FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT r298990 arm using a poudriere environment. The build failed:

(04:55:50) GNUmakefile:25837: recipe for target 'all' failed
(04:55:52) gmake[1]: *** [all] Segmentation fault (core dumped)
(04:55:52) gmake[1]: INTERNAL: Exiting with 1 jobserver tokens available; should be 4!
(04:55:52) gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/webkit-gtk2/work/webkitgtk-2.4.11'
(04:55:52) ===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.

See attached poudriere build log.

The build without debug symbols finished successfully.
